name: Rimba Tropis
signature: Layered monstera and palm-leaf silhouettes — each traced with fine brass vein lines — drift in parallax depth behind every section like an open-air resort pavilion's jungle canopy. A botanical wreath frames the couple's monogram on the cover, brass corner-tick framing dresses photos and cards like pavilion joinery, and a warm faux-marble texture marks the countdown and RSVP.
brief: Outdoor garden-party wedding elevated to luxury resort territory — gold-veined botanical illustration rather than flat leaf shapes, brass pavilion framing, warm marble accents. Includes the full standard section set (Susunan Acara with icons, Dress Code, Hashtag & Instagram, quick-nav, auto-scroll, per-section background photos).
